title: CodeChicken Lib CRE
description: CodeChicken Lib Cleanroom Edition. Forked for compat & updates.
body:
# **This is a [Cleanroom Loader](https://github.com/CleanroomMC/Cleanroom) mod!**

Forked from original [CodeChickenLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/codechicken-lib-1-8)

Contains various libraries for 3D math and transformations, rendering, networking, configs, and much, much more.

Changes: 
- The old CCL will crash in non-FG2 dev environment, making `runClient` impossible. This fork fixed that.
- Fixed crash on launch with Cleanroom
- Add an option to disable supporter feature since the server json is invalid.
- Planning to move some APIs to Cleanroom, then make CCL some kind of wrapper.

Maven: https://repo.cleanroommc.com/#/releases/codechicken/CodeChickenLib
